title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates!
